title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C — Live Python Dependency Closure and Conditional Import Map
intent: Install an isolated static dependency-closure and conditional-import evidence component using only verified prior mission evidence and one immutable in-memory source capture.
rollback_boundary: Remove only the three newly added V1A-3C Technical Core files and generated V1A-3C mission outputs if validation fails; preserve all existing FOXAI source, prior evidence, launchers, runtimes, models, databases, and personal files.

changes.content:
{
  "schema": "foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a3c.live_dependency_contract.v1",
  "mission_id": "ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6",
  "title": "Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C — Live Python Dependency Closure and Conditional Import Map",
  "source_missions": [
    "ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9",
    "ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5",
    "ENG-20260721-154935-FF96C4"
  ],
  "protected_direct_context_count": 6,
  "static_only": true,
  "source_or_package_imports": false,
  "payload_interpreter_child_processes": 0,
  "payload_shell_child_processes": 0,
  "network_used": false,
  "packages_installed": false,
  "models_loaded": false,
  "source_capture": {
    "single_read_immutable_in_memory": true,
    "raw_source_content_persisted": false,
    "second_build_rereads_live_tree": false
  },
  "output_ceiling_bytes": 33554432,
  "outputs": [
    "LIVE_CONTEXT_SELECTION.json",
    "FIRST_PARTY_IMPORT_CLOSURES.json",
    "CONDITIONAL_AND_DEFERRED_IMPORTS.json",
    "PROTECTED_CONTEXT_PACKAGE_REQUIREMENTS.json",
    "UNRESOLVED_IMPORT_BRANCHES.json",
    "DYNAMIC_IMPORT_CLOSURE_MAP.json",
    "LIVE_DEPENDENCY_COVERAGE.json",
    "LIVE_DEPENDENCY_RECEIPT.json"
  ],
  "query_commands": [
    "trace-dependency",
    "explain-import-guard",
    "show-context-requirements",
    "explain-unresolved-branch"
  ]
}

# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C

This isolated component builds recursive static Python dependency closures for the six protected known-good launcher contexts. It uses the verified V1A-2R2, V1A-3A-R1, and V1A-3B evidence sets.

It reads each indexed Python source file at most once into an in-memory immutable capture, verifies its current hash against the V1A-2R2 source index, and builds both deterministic passes from that same capture. Raw source content is not written into the generated evidence.

The mapper distinguishes module-load, function-local, class-body, optional ImportError-guarded, TYPE_CHECKING, platform, Python-version, literal-condition, and evidence-incomplete conditional imports. It follows only statically reachable first-party providers from each protected entry point and preserves cycles, unresolved branches, dynamic-import references, and path mutations as evidence rather than proof of execution.

No FOXAI source, launcher, package, model, Python entry point, shell command, or network operation is executed by the payload.

validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3C payloads, syntax, source-only imports, and immutable-capture contract
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A3C"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
 (drop/r"live_dependency_closure_map_v1.py",installed/r"live_dependency_closure_map_v1.py","a8d084f9fe70b2adb0f342ecff6741224f729fbe1c6030b79fe2581ae7da4f44"),
 (drop/r"LIVE_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json",installed/r"LIVE_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json","90705fa00084e014297e0baea41cbb6934b8277a99d58395aa9d806ea4609d1b"),
 (drop/r"README_V1A3C.md",installed/r"README_V1A3C.md","e7aea4e08adc8d2691cc77298ad3d2fdf866662737666492eb3cc7f8e46e39d9"),
]
for src,dst,expected in checks:
 assert src.is_file() and dst.is_file(),(src,dst)
 assert hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,src
 assert hashlib.sha256(dst.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,dst
script=(installed/r"live_dependency_closure_map_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(installed/r"live_dependency_closure_map_v1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
 if isinstance(node,ast.Import): imports.update(a.name.split('.')[0] for a in node.names)
 elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module: imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden),sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract=json.loads((installed/r"LIVE_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("schema")=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a3c.live_dependency_contract.v1"
assert contract.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6"
assert contract.get("protected_direct_context_count")==6
assert contract.get("source_capture",{}).get("single_read_immutable_in_memory") is True
assert contract.get("source_capture",{}).get("second_build_rereads_live_tree") is False
assert contract.get("payload_interpreter_child_processes")==0
assert contract.get("payload_shell_child_processes")==0
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_PAYLOAD_CONTRACT_VERIFIED")

validations.name: Run in-memory dependency guard and relative-import self-tests
Build six protected static dependency closures from verified immutable evidence
Run built-in V1A-3C output, hash, coverage, safety, and size validator
Verify exactly six separate protected contexts and preserve the Web called-launcher relationship
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6_V1A3C_LIVE_DEPENDENCY_MAP")
selection=json.loads((out/r"LIVE_CONTEXT_SELECTION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert selection.get("protected_direct_context_count")==6
assert selection.get("contexts_merged") is False
roles={x.get("role") for x in selection.get("contexts",[])}
expected={"web_portable_webui","web_with_comfyui_helper","desktop_recovery_helper","desktop_recovery_gui","workshop_comfy_manager","workshop_gui_bare_python"}
assert roles==expected,(roles,expected)
links=selection.get("called_launcher_relationships",[])
assert len(links)==1 and links[0].get("relationship_preserved_without_context_merge") is True
assert str(links[0].get("callee","")).casefold()==r"z:\foxai\start_foxai_web_portable.bat"
work=next(x for x in selection["contexts"] if x.get("role")=="workshop_gui_bare_python")
assert work.get("interpreter_reference_kind")=="command_alias_requires_path_resolution"
assert work.get("resolved_interpreter_path") is None
ui=next(x for x in selection["contexts"] if x.get("role")=="desktop_recovery_gui")
assert ui.get("interpreter_reference_kind")=="pythonw_static_sibling_of_observed_python"
assert ui.get("runtime_identity_directly_observed") is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_CONTEXTS_VERIFIED")

validations.name: Verify closure line evidence, conditional guards, cycle boundaries, and no Cartesian expansion
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6_V1A3C_LIVE_DEPENDENCY_MAP")
closures=json.loads((out/r"FIRST_PARTY_IMPORT_CLOSURES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
conditional=json.loads((out/r"CONDITIONAL_AND_DEFERRED_IMPORTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
unresolved=json.loads((out/r"UNRESOLVED_IMPORT_BRANCHES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
dynamic=json.loads((out/r"DYNAMIC_IMPORT_CLOSURE_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
coverage=json.loads((out/r"LIVE_DEPENDENCY_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert closures.get("context_count")==6
assert closures.get("all_edges_have_exact_source_path_and_line") is True
assert closures.get("cycle_detection_enabled") is True
for ctx in closures.get("contexts",[]):
 for edge in ctx.get("edges",[]):
  assert edge.get("source_path") and int(edge.get("source_line") or 0)>0
  assert edge.get("edge_execution_proven") is False
assert conditional.get("conditionally_guarded_imports_labeled_unconditional")==0
assert unresolved.get("unresolved_branches_labeled_confirmed")==0
assert unresolved.get("import_failures_proven") is False
assert dynamic.get("unreached_records_called_active") is False
assert coverage.get("cartesian_all_imports_by_all_contexts_expansion") is False
assert coverage.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert coverage.get("source_code_file_count")==565
assert coverage.get("protected_direct_context_count")==6
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_CLOSURE_GUARDS_VERIFIED")

validations.name: Verify deterministic receipt, exact output hashes, protected hashes, zero payload child processes, and 32 MiB ceiling
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6_V1A3C_LIVE_DEPENDENCY_MAP")
required={"LIVE_CONTEXT_SELECTION.json","FIRST_PARTY_IMPORT_CLOSURES.json","CONDITIONAL_AND_DEFERRED_IMPORTS.json","PROTECTED_CONTEXT_PACKAGE_REQUIREMENTS.json","UNRESOLVED_IMPORT_BRANCHES.json","DYNAMIC_IMPORT_CLOSURE_MAP.json","LIVE_DEPENDENCY_COVERAGE.json","LIVE_DEPENDENCY_RECEIPT.json"}
assert required.issubset({p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()})
receipt=json.loads((out/r"LIVE_DEPENDENCY_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6"
assert receipt.get("result")=="live_python_dependency_closure_and_conditional_import_map_complete"
assert receipt.get("source_outputs_verified_exact") is True
assert receipt.get("internal_deterministic_rebuild_match") is True
assert receipt.get("compared_output_count")==7
assert receipt.get("protected_direct_context_count")==6
assert receipt.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert receipt.get("source_code_file_count")==565
assert receipt.get("known_good_candidates_all_match") is True
assert receipt.get("cartesian_expansion_used") is False
for key in ("imports_or_source_executed","network_used","packages_installed","models_loaded","existing_foxai_source_modified"):
 assert receipt.get(key) is False,(key,receipt.get(key))
assert receipt.get("interpreter_child_processes")==0 and receipt.get("shell_child_processes")==0
for item in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
 p=out/item["name"]
 assert p.is_file() and p.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"]
protected={
 r"Config\model_sources.json":"c17eb3b8b6c93734f7e117522213c95af6c105fe26400d0560768fe586e21c91",
 r"core\foxai_web.py":"e4e9fd62e6c4736a18781c6b17184441e8852412867cc95dbca94e570921ba77",
 r"Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat":"c438259fb5a24476373c677a43999344a6e1fc550e50a6e7d2fc590147784af7",
 r"START_FOXAI_DESKTOP_TWO_WINDOW_RECOVERY.bat":"9bbf09e917a5bfd4202395467d7ff4777964d290c8bec7e2944914365ca13901",
 r"START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat":"834e129be2d41405be40e1ea5aeca6d7a96b4faaf3b72c906487e902a9dca3b1",
 r"START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat":"e93618e7f702241519fdb855b234d3c83e020bc57adefa54944fcc7c4ae150cc",
}
for rel,expected in protected.items():
 p=root/rel
 assert p.is_file() and hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,(p,expected)
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total < 32*1024*1024,total
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_RECEIPT_HASHES_SAFETY_VERIFIED")
